channel.title: Snapshot Safari Updates
channel.description: Most recent updates to Snapshot Safari

item.title: Snapshot Safari 1.0.1
item.description:
Snapshot Safari 1.0.1

Fixes

  • Automation permission now registers correctly. Switched Safari bridge to in-process OSAScript execution so the TCC prompt lands on Snapshot Safari's bundle id (com.ernest.snapshot-safari) instead of com.apple.osascript. The app now appears in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Automation with a working toggle.

Changes

  • Settings panel redesigned with a sidebar layout and native macOS window chrome (red close, yellow minimize, green zoom). Closes with ⌘W and the red traffic-light button instead of ESC-only.
  • Settings styling now uses the same material backgrounds, SF Symbol hierarchy, and section header vocabulary as the rest of the app.
  • About tab now reads the version and build from the bundle's Info.plist so they stay accurate.

Notes

This build is still signed ad-hoc. First launch will require a one-click bypass of the Gatekeeper warning ("developer cannot be verified"). After that, the app launches normally.

item.title: Snapshot Safari 1.0.0
item.description:
Snapshot Safari 1.0.0

Initial public release. Save and restore Safari tab states, compare snapshots, and schedule auto-snapshots.

Features

  • Take snapshots of all open Safari tabs (⌘N)
  • Auto-naming with date, tab count, and type
  • Search across snapshot name, URL, tab title, and domain
  • Rename and trash snapshots with 30-day auto-cleanup
  • Export/Import snapshots as JSON files (⌘E / ⌘I)
  • Restore all tabs or select specific ones
  • Compare two snapshots to see added, removed, and unchanged tabs
  • Auto-snapshots every 30 min, 1h, 2h, or 4h
  • Sparkle-powered auto-updates
  • Light, Dark, and System themes

iCloud Sync

The iCloud Sync feature is included in the app but is disabled in this public build. The CloudKit entitlements require an Apple Developer ID signature that public downloads cannot carry. See the project README for build instructions if you want to enable sync for personal use.
